problem_summary: AlGaN/GaN HEMT heterostructure membrane supported by a residual silicon frame in high-power microwave GaN device platform and bonding-free diamond integration: Can approximately 50 micrometers of CVD diamond be grown directly on the N-polar side of a GaN and III-N membrane structure without causing unacceptable residual stress, membrane bow, delamination, local process overheating, structural damage, or incompatibility with downstream semiconductor fabrication?
